commands.repair_reason: - [P1] Needs contributor-supplied real behavior proof before merge; no narrow automated code repair is indicated.; Cleared: The diff only reorders existing OpenAI WebView blocking-state logic and adds a focused Swift test; it does not add dependencies, scripts, permissions, or new secret handling. (sha=0d84bb855638022bbfc83890c99dae6f94bda6c3)
commands.review_summary:
The PR reorders OpenAI dashboard WebView blocking-state checks ahead of wrong-route reloads and adds focused coverage for the reload predicate.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: simulate a scrape with a non-usage href plus `loginRequired` or `cloudflareInterstitial`, and current main reloads before reporting the blocking state. I did not run a live provider probe because repository policy warns against account/browser-cookie flows without explicit request.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Needs contributor-supplied real behavior proof before merge; no narrow automated code repair is indicated.

target.title: Fix OpenAI webview route reload loop
target.body:
## Summary
Fix the OpenAI dashboard route reload logic so blocking states are handled before wrong-route reload.

## Validation
- `swift test --filter OpenAIDashboardFetcherCreditsWaitTests`
- `swift test --filter 'AugmentStatusProbeTests|StatusMenuSwitcherClickTests|StatusMenuPersistentRefreshTests|StatusMenuOpenRefreshTests|StatusItemControllerShutdownTests|OpenAIDashboardFetcherCreditsWaitTests'`
- `make check`

## Runtime Proof
Focused route-state proof run:

```text
$ swift test --filter OpenAIDashboardFetcherCreditsWaitTests
Test "usage route reload skips blocking states" with 3 test cases passed:
- href=https://chatgpt.com/#usage, loginRequired=true -> expected false
- href=https://chatgpt.com/, cloudflareInterstitial=true -> expected false
- href=https://chatgpt.com/, no blocking state -> expected true
Suite OpenAIDashboardFetcherCreditsWaitTests passed
Test run with 29 tests in 1 suite passed
```

Also ran `git diff --check`; it passed with no output.
target.author: prospectore

commands.reason: PR is not opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
